Stage 1 Modeling Report

Inlet features → Effluent targets  |  Train: 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024  |  Test: 2025  |  Run: 1

Summary

Model RF — Train RF — Test LR Baseline — Test
RMSER² RMSER² RMSER²
stage1_grab_BOD 3.688 0.932 3.895 -0.040 6.932 -2.293
stage1_grab_COD 13.865 0.887 24.141 -0.272 22.768 -0.132
stage1_grab_TSS 16.120 0.872 10.809 -0.268 16.287 -1.879
stage1_grab_pH 0.085 0.912 0.285 -0.717 0.268 -0.515
stage1_comp_BOD 5.129 0.922 3.444 -0.128 11.294 -11.126
stage1_comp_COD 21.531 0.855 25.548 -0.675 33.030 -1.800
stage1_comp_TSS 16.269 0.828 6.674 -0.407 21.412 -13.484
stage1_comp_pH 0.084 0.912 0.303 -1.295 0.317 -1.514

R² colour scale: ≥ 0.70 good 0.40–0.70 moderate < 0.40 poor

Key Observations

  • Best R² on test set: stage1_grab_BOD (RF R² = -0.040)
  • Worst R² on test set: stage1_comp_pH (RF R² = -1.295)
  • RF outperforms LR baseline (lower test RMSE) in 6 of 8 models.
  • All R² values are negative or near zero — expected at Stage 1. Inlet concentrations carry almost no signal for predicting effluent quality. Stage 2 (secondary clarifier features) will address this.
